The IOC summary confirms 1 IP, 1 domain, 6 registry persistence keys, and 0 dropped files. The process activity shows 0 processes created, which is interesting given the process tree showed services.e

The process activity shows no processes created and no mutexes created, which contradicts the initial overview that listed 8 mutexes. The notable modules include network-related DLLs (ws2_32, wshtcpip
